headline: European Wax Center, Inc. (EWCZ) Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates
summary: European Wax Center (EWCZ) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +130.95% and -0.88%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2025. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: Lamb Weston to Announce Fiscal Year 2026 Third Quarter Financial Results on April 1, 2026
summary: EAGLE, Idaho, March 04, 2026--Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: LW) announced today it will report fiscal 2026 third quarter financial results on April 1, 2026. The news release will be issued at approximately 8:30 a.m. ET, followed by a conference call at 10:00 a.m. ET.
